title: Narrowing the digital divide in schools and colleges
body: "This consultation outlines the Department for Education’s long-term vision for narrowing the digital divide in schools and colleges, focusing on proposals for the future of the digital and technology standards. It covers 3 key aims:    prioritising essential technology infrastructure managing technology risks harnessing technology opportunities   To inform future policy development, the document also seeks to gather evidence on:   the sector’s readiness to meet 6 core standards barriers faced in meeting standards support required to meet standards examples of best practice evidence gaps   Your views will help refine the approach and ensure all students benefit from the opportunities that technology offers. "
